title: Nano-island-encapsulated cobalt single-atom catalysts for breaking activity-stability trade-off in Fenton-like reactions

跨学科关系.head: nano-island encapsulated single cobalt atom (Co<sub>SA/Zn.O</sub>-ZnO)
跨学科关系.relation: enhances the activity and stability of
跨学科关系.evidence: Herein, we design a nano-island encapsulated single cobalt atom (Co<sub>SA/Zn.O</sub>-ZnO) catalyst to enhance the activity and stability of PMS activation for contaminant degradation via an "island-sea" synergistic effect.

跨学科关系.head: nano-island encapsulated single cobalt atom (Co<sub>SA/Zn.O</sub>-ZnO)
跨学科关系.evidence: The Co<sub>SA/Zn.O</sub>-ZnO/PMS system exhibits a remarkable selectivity in exclusively generating sulfate radicals (SO<sub>4</sub><sup>•-</sup>), leading to a complete removal of various recalcitrant pollutants within a shorter period.

跨学科关系.head: sulfate radicals (SO<sub>4</sub><sup>•-</sup>)
跨学科关系.evidence: The Co<sub>SA/Zn.O</sub>-ZnO/PMS system exhibits a remarkable selectivity in exclusively generating sulfate radicals (SO<sub>4</sub><sup>•-</sup>), leading to a complete removal of various recalcitrant pollutants within a shorter period.

跨学科关系.head: nano-island encapsulated single cobalt atom (Co<sub>SA/Zn.O</sub>-ZnO)
跨学科关系.evidence: Characterized by minimal leaching of active sites, robust catalytic performance, and low-toxicity decontamination, this system proves highly efficient in multiple treatment cycles and complex water matrices.

跨学科关系.evidence: Characterized by minimal leaching of active sites, robust catalytic performance, and low-toxicity decontamination, this system proves highly efficient in multiple treatment cycles and complex water matrices.

title: High-entropy alloy enables multi-path electron synergism and lattice oxygen activation for enhanced oxygen evolution activity

跨学科关系.head: high-entropy alloys (HEAs)
跨学科关系.evidence: We reveal that high-entropy alloys (HEAs) can efficiently activate the LOM through synergistic multi-path electron transfer.

跨学科关系.head: multi-path electron transfer
跨学科关系.evidence: We reveal that high-entropy alloys (HEAs) can efficiently activate the LOM through synergistic multi-path electron transfer.

跨学科关系.head: Ni-Co dual-site
跨学科关系.evidence: Specifically, the oxidation of nickel is enhanced by this electron transfer, aided by the integration of weaker Co-O bonds, enabling effective LOM at the Ni-Co dual-site.

跨学科关系.head: Co-O bonds
跨学科关系.evidence: Specifically, the oxidation of nickel is enhanced by this electron transfer, aided by the integration of weaker Co-O bonds, enabling effective LOM at the Ni-Co dual-site.

跨学科关系.head: NiFeCoCrW<sub>0.2</sub> HEA
跨学科关系.evidence: These insights allow the design of a NiFeCoCrW<sub>0.2</sub> HEA that exhibits improved activity, achieving an overpotential of 220 mV at a current density of 10 mA cm<sup>-2</sup>.

跨学科关系.head: high-entropy alloys (HEAs)
跨学科关系.evidence: This study sheds light on the synergistic effects that confer high activity in HEAs and contribute to the advancement of high-performance OER electrocatalysts.

title: MXene-Assisted NiFe sulfides for high-performance anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis

跨学科关系.head: MXene (Ti3C2)
跨学科关系.evidence: Herein, we report a robust OER electrocatalyst for AEMSE by integrating MXene (Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>) with NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)

跨学科关系.head: NiFe硫化物 ((Ni,Fe)S2@Ti3C2)
跨学科关系.relation: prohibits the dissolution of Fe species via
跨学科关系.evidence: particularly prohibits the dissolution of Fe species during OER process via the Ti-O-Fe bonding effectively

跨学科关系.head: MXene (Ti3C2)
跨学科关系.evidence: the good retention of sulfates and the abundant groups of Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> provide effective Cl<sup>-</sup> resistance

跨学科关系.head: NiFe硫化物 ((Ni,Fe)S2@Ti3C2)
跨学科关系.evidence: (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> achieves high OER activity (1.598 V@2 A cm<sup>-2</sup>)

跨学科关系.head: NiFe硫化物 ((Ni,Fe)S2@Ti3C2)
跨学科关系.evidence: and long-term durability (1000 h) in seawater system

跨学科关系.head: NiFe硫化物 ((Ni,Fe)S2@Ti3C2)
跨学科关系.tail: 工业电流密度 (0.5 A cm-2)
跨学科关系.evidence: AEMSE with industrial current density (0.5 A cm<sup>-2</sup>)

跨学科关系.evidence: with electrolysis efficiency of 70% and energy consumption of 48.4 kWh kg<sup>-1</sup> H<sub>2</sub>
